title: Frozen Pea Snow
description: A fluffy and light Chinese dish featuring frozen peas with a touch of smokiness, perfect for a diabetic-friendly snack.
instructions: Thaw the frozen peas in water and then boil them for about 5 minutes until heated through.
Drain the peas, reserving some cooking liquid if needed.
In a small saucepan, mix together soy sauce, sherry, and pepper powder. Heat gently to allow flavors to meld.
Pour the prepared sauce over the hot boiled peas and toss well to coat them evenly.
Serve immediately as an appetizer or snack.
